headline: FedEx Closes On ShopRunner Acquisition
summary: FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) said Monday it has completed its acquisition of e-commerce platform ShopRunner that was announced earlier this month. Terms of the transaction have not been disclosed.

headline: Warren Buffett Called Bitcoin 'Rat Poison' — Now It's Closing In On Berkshire Hathaway's Valuation
summary:
The rise of bitcoin has been one of the top stories of 2020.

What Happened: Bitcoin hit all-time highs throughout December, passing the $27,000 level on Dec. 27.

headline: Mizuho's Top Semiconductor Stocks For 2021: Do You Own Them?
summary:
The new year is shaping up to be a strong one for semiconductor stocks, an analyst at Mizuho Securities said, citing key trends.

First-Half Momentum For Semiconductors:  Semiconductor companies are poised to see a constructive first half, with accelerating year-over-year momentum and favorable macroeconomic tailwinds, Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh said in a note.

One of the most common questions traders have about stocks is “Why Is It Moving?”

That’s why Benzinga created the Why Is It Moving, or WIIM, feature in Benzinga Pro. WIIMs are a one-sentence description as to why that stock is moving.

headline: Return On Capital Employed Overview: Microsoft
summary: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) posted Q1 earnings of $15.88 billion, an increase from Q4 of 18.42%. Sales dropped to $37.15 billion, a 2.31% decrease between quarters. In Q4, Microsoft earned $13.41 billion, whereas sales reached $38.03 billion.

headline: Elon Musk Says Taking Tesla Private 'Impossible' Now
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) going private is “impossible” now, according to the electric vehicle company’s CEO Elon Musk.

headline: BMW Raises 2023 EV Manufacturing Target By 250,000 Units
summary: German automaker Bayerische Motoren Werke ADR (OTC: BMWYY) is gearing up to increase its presence in the electric vehicles segment in the next two years. The luxury carmaker is planning to increase its 2023 forecasted output by about 250,000 units.
